description: Style NoteThese sandals from catwalk are perfect for casual wear. Pop these on to jazz up your outfit when you're dressing to impress.Product DetailsBlue peep-toes sandal with a forefoot strap with a cut out design and an ankle strap with cut-out design and a tang claspSmooth slim footbed with branding embossed on the heelPlastic outsole with branded grooves on the forefoot and a stacked heel in floral designMaterial and CarePlastic and syntheticWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not use a drier or store in direct sunlight
